queries.name: trending-credential-fraud
queries.query: (fake OR fraud OR forged OR counterfeit) (degree OR diploma OR certificate OR credential) lang:en -is:retweet min_faves:50

queries.name: viral-verification-threads
queries.query: (verify OR verification OR authentic OR legitimate) (degree OR diploma OR certificate) lang:en min_replies:10 min_faves:50

queries.name: breaking-education-news
queries.query: (breaking OR "just in" OR announced) (university OR college OR education) (scandal OR fraud OR fake OR investigation) lang:en -is:retweet min_faves:100

queries.name: hiring-verification-debates
queries.query: (employer OR recruiter OR hiring) (fake degree OR credential fraud OR diploma mill OR verification) lang:en min_replies:5 min_faves:20
queries.description: Debates about hiring and credential verification

queries.name: blockchain-credentials-discussion
queries.query: (blockchain OR NFT OR web3 OR crypto) (certificate OR credential OR degree OR diploma OR badge) lang:en -is:retweet min_faves:30

queries.name: online-education-growth
queries.query: ("online education" OR "online learning" OR "remote learning" OR "e-learning") (growth OR boom OR surge OR increase) (certificate OR credential) lang:en -is:retweet min_faves:30

queries.query: (LinkedIn OR portfolio) (share OR showcase OR display) (certificate OR credential OR badge OR achievement) lang:en -is:retweet min_faves:20

queries.query: ("skills-based hiring" OR "skill-first" OR "competency-based") (credential OR certificate OR proof OR validation) lang:en -is:retweet min_faves:30

queries.name: celebrity-edu-fraud

queries.query: ("digital transformation" OR digitization OR modernization) (education OR university OR college OR learning) (certificate OR credential OR diploma) lang:en -is:retweet min_faves:30

settings.description: Discovers trending conversations, viral threads, breaking news, and debates about credentials, education fraud, and verification. Helps BWS identify timely opportunities for engagement and thought leadership.
